title: ixeridium dentatum subsp. kitayamense
intro: Ixeridium dentatum subsp. kitayamense is a subspecies of the Ixeridium dentatum plant, also known as a type of flowering plant in the family Compositae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ixeridium dentatum subsp. kitayamense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing its leaves to be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
